name: wisp-wallet
display_name: Wisp — Cross-chain x402 Wallet for AI Agents
description: Give Claude a cross-chain wallet. Pay x402-gated APIs in WISP on Casper or USDC on Base — gasless, no accounts.
long_description:
Wisp gives an AI agent a real cross-chain wallet (Casper + Base) and the ability to autonomously pay x402-gated APIs — WISP on Casper, USDC on Base, picked automatically from the 402 response. Tools:

- **check_balance** — CSPR, WISP, and Base USDC balances
- **x402_fetch** — fetch any URL, auto-paying x402 (EIP-712 / EIP-3009, gasless for you)
- **pay** — sign an x402 payment authorization
- **transfer_cspr** / **transfer_token** — move CSPR / WISP on Casper
- **request_funding** — how to top up (fiat on-ramp + tokens)
- **spending_report** — budget + payment history
- **search_bazaar** — discover x402 services across chains

Budget limits (max per call / per day) protect your funds.

mnemonic.title: Casper Seed Phrase (24 words)
mnemonic.description: Your BIP39 mnemonic. Derives a secp256k1 Casper key (m/44'/506'/0'/0/0). Used to sign x402 payments. Stored in your OS keychain.

network.title: Casper Network
network.description: CAIP-2 network id: casper:casper-test (testnet) or casper:casper (mainnet).

cspr_cloud_key.title: CSPR.cloud Access Key
cspr_cloud_key.description: CSPR.cloud access key — used for balance reads and to authorize the x402 facilitator. Get one at https://cspr.cloud.

base_private_key.title: Base Wallet Private Key (optional)
base_private_key.description: 0x EVM private key for paying x402 services in USDC on Base Sepolia. Optional — Casper works without it. Stored in your OS keychain.

max_per_call.title: Max WISP per Payment
max_per_call.description: Maximum WISP allowed per single x402 payment. Safety limit.

max_per_day.title: Max WISP per Day
max_per_day.description: Maximum total WISP allowed per calendar day.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check CSPR and WISP balances and the wallet address.

tools.name: x402_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL, auto-paying x402 charges in WISP on Casper.

tools.name: transfer_cspr
tools.description: Send native CSPR to a public key.

tools.name: transfer_token
tools.description: Send the WISP token to an account hash.

tools.name: request_funding
tools.description: Show how to fund the wallet (on-ramp + token).

tools.name: spending_report
tools.description: Show budget usage and recent payments.

tools.name: search_bazaar
tools.description: Discover x402-gated services to pay for.
